Study Title: Whole transcriptome exploration revealed the dysregulated RNAs involved in SARS-CoV-2 spike protein inhibited apoptosis in Calu-3 cells
Study design: 3 Calu-3 control samples, 3 SARS-CoV-2 Spike protein treated Calu-3 samples

Study Title: SARS-CoV-2 nsp13 restricts episomal DNA transcription without affecting chromosomal DNA
Study design: 3 Vector-treated HEK293T samples, 3 HA-nsp13 expressing HEK293T samples.

Study Title: ACE2 knockout hinders SARS-CoV-2 propagation in iPS cell-derived airway and alveolar epithelial cells
Study design: 18 iPSC-derived samples (ACE2 knockout study), 12 ACE2-knockout/affected (disease) and 6 wild-type/controls.

Study Title: ACE2-independent SARS-CoV-2 virus entry through cell surface GRP78 on monocytes - evidence from a translational clinical and experimental approach
Study design: 4 healthy primary monocyte samples, 4 COVID-19 primary monocyte samples

Study Title: Timecourse of SARS-CoV-2 Infection with New York & Washington Isolates
Study design: Comparative gene expression profiling analysis of RNA-seq data for the New York 1-PV08001/2020 and USA-WA1/2020 isolates of SARS-CoV-2 in NHBE cells at 6, 12, and 24hpi.

Study Title: Sequence and dynamics of SARS-CoV-2 host cell interactions inferred from transcriptome analyses
Study design: RNA-sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 infected Caco-2 cells at different timepoints after viral infection (0h, 1h, 2h, 4h, 7h, 12h, 24h & 48h). Mock samples were used as control at t=4h,12h,48h. Replicates (n=3) were obtained for each time point

Study Title: Characterizing spatial and global host innate immune responses against SARS-CoV-1 and -2 infection in pathologically relevant human lung epithelial cells
Study design: Calu-3/2B4 cells infected with SARS-CoV-1 or -2 at 3 timepoints (12-, 24-, and 48-hours post-infection)

Study Title: Transcriptomic analysis of sorted lung cells revealed a proviral activity of the NF-ÎºB pathway towards SARS-CoV-2 (RNA-Seq depleted polyA)
Study design: A549-ACE2 cells, SARS-CoV-2 infected (S+) vs bystander (S-) vs mock controls

Study Title: Transcriptomic analysis of sorted lung cells revealed a proviral activity of the NF-ÎºB pathway towards SARS-CoV-2 (RNA-Seq total)
Study design: 18 sorted lung cell samples, 12 infected/bystander (disease) and 6 mock-infected controls.

Study Title: Transcriptomic analysis of sorted lung cells revealed a proviral activity of the NF-ÎºB pathway towards SARS-CoV-2 (RNA-Seq depleted total)
Study design: 18 sorted lung cell samples, 12 infected/bystander (disease) and 6 mock-infected controls
